titleStmt.title: SII 26.276: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 276. (A.R. No. 261 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Kachchāpēśvara temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājādhirājadēva II: Year 8, Tai = 1171 A.D. (?)

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of the tax paid in oil as well as one paḻaṅkāśu per oil-press from the oil-presses established on the premises of the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār of Tirukkachchūr to provide for the expenses of the temple connected with the burning of two nandā lamps and ten sandhi lamps, for food-offerings on every Amāvāsya day and for oil for the torches used on the occasion of taking out (the images) in procession. The gift was made by the assembly consisting of the oil-mongers, who went by the name of Mānagar, of Śri-Kāñchimānagar and the people of the 24 Nagaras of the Kāñchī-maṇḍalam, who had gathered in full strength and with no absentees, in the temple of Tirukkāṭṭuppaḷḷiuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Kāñchimāṉagar. This endowment is stated to be a Jāti-dharmam. One samaiyaṉārāyaṇat-tamiḻavēḷān is stated to have written this on the orders of the Nagara (i.e., the members of the above-mentioned assembly).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉpākat
tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājātirājate
vaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu taimmāsattu śrīkā
ñcimānakarattu Aṭikkiḻttalattu māṉakarāṉa vā
ṇiyaromum Immaṇṭalattu Irupattunālu
nakarattomum śrīkāñcimāṉakarattut tiruk
kāṭṭupaḷḷiuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil ku
ṟaivaṟakkūṭi niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu Iruntu tirukkaccū
r Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyā
r tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Iṭṭu Āṭukiṟa cekku I
n nāyaṉārkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eriyun tirununtā viḷakku Ira
ṇṭukku Eṇṇai Uriyum cantiviḷakku pattukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkum
Amāvāci Oṉṟukku tiruvamutu Arici patakkum kaṟiyamutu niṟai
ṉāṟpatiṉ palamum neyamutu Āḻākkum miḷakamutu Oru cevi
ṭum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku pattum Ilaiyamutu paṟṟukkālu
m Appamutukku paccai Arici kuṟuṇiyum ney nāḻiyum
caṟkaraiṉāḻiyum tiruvitiyil Eḻuntaruḷa piṭiviḷakku
kku Eṇṇai ṉāḻiyum Āka Ippaṭiyāl vanta nimantat
tukku cekkāl vanta kaṭamai Eṇṇaiyum cek
kukku Iṟukkum paḻaṅkācu Onṟum Ittaṉaiyum nitta nimanta
m cantirādittavarai celvatāka jātitanmamāka viṭṭuk kalve
ṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai
nakaram paṇikka camaiyaṉārāyaṇat tamiḻaveḷān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
